neighborhoods.name: Kalamata Center
neighborhoods.description: Capital of Messenia with a lively waterfront, historic castle, weekly market, and famous olive oil production
neighborhoods.character: Waterfront city center, olive capital, market culture
neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Nafplio. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

neighborhoods.name: Kardamyli
neighborhoods.description: Coastal stone village in the Mani peninsula, made famous by Patrick Leigh Fermor, with hiking and sea access
neighborhoods.character: Stone village, literary heritage, hiking and sea
neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Nafplio's center and services.

neighborhoods.name: Messini
neighborhoods.description: Inland agricultural town near ancient Messene with affordable living and local produce markets
neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

neighborhoods.name: Stoupa
neighborhoods.description: Beach village with established British and international community, tavernas, and two sandy beaches
neighborhoods.character: Beach village, expat social hub, relaxed lifestyle
neighborhoods.character_notes: Area with established international community and expat-oriented services. English is more commonly spoken here than in other neighborhoods.
